form.formComment: Solid run when a close second behind Laborantin at Caen over 2450m in a 5yo gelding race on March 25 at $10. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second behind L'arnacoeur at Graignes over 2725m in a 5yo gelding race on April 12 at $12. Definite winning chance.

form.formComment: Last start 11th (25m) over 2800m at Pontchateau beaten 73m by Lys Gema in 5yo handicap on March 29 at $57. At his previous start 7th over 2850m at Laval beaten 34m by Lord De Chenu in 5yo gelding race on February 18 at $45. Capable of a strong showing.

form.formComment: Last preparation only had one start before going for a break. Returned to racing with a handy win a big 17m win at La Capelle beating Librium in 5yo gelding race on April 6. Back in great order and is the one to beat again.

form.formComment: Ran well last start showing plenty of improvement following March 15 run. Last start won by 2.5m at Saint-Aubin-les-Elbeuf beating Lord De La Noe in 5yo race on March 29. This race will be harder than that win. Will not find this easy. Not keen.
